PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('mytype')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''supertype'')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('unless')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''test string'')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('mytype')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''supertype'')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('unless')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(+>)('+>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''test string'')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')

            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')

            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''test string'')

  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('mytype')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''supertype'')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('unless')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiComment(COMMENT)('# with comment')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''test string'')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('mytype')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''supertype'')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('unless')
            PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
            PsiComment(COMMENT)('# with comment')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
            PsiElement(+>)('+>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''test string'')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n\n')
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('mytype')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''supertype'')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('unless')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiComment(COMMENT)('/* with block comment */')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''test string'')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('mytype')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''supertype'')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('unless')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiComment(COMMENT)('/* with block comment */')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
            PsiElement(+>)('+>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''test string'')
      PsiElement(})('}')
